contentAuthority.policy: Authored HTML, sheets/JSON, shared documents, and DA media exist only in DA; Git owns code, pipelines, manifests, schemas, and redacted evidence.

notes: Final CLI/proof tags and DA snapshot digest do not exist yet; strict freeze must fail until final release signoff.
The retained certification and promotion runs used source-tree CLI f0b0078.
Retained to prevent the old 404 URL from being mistaken for current verified media proof.
The canonical DA × Oak report preserves the poster-only Riverboat result separately and does not claim live publication.

historicalEvidence.policy: Historical execution evidence; not current authored-content input and not a live-release proof.
Documents the retired Git-fixture model and DA-only migration; references to removed fixtures are historical only.
